productDisplayName: John Players Men Solid Black Polo T-Shirt
description: Composition Black T-shirt made of 100% cotton knit, has a ribbed collar with white tipping, three-button chest placket, brand embroidery on the left chest, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and hem with white knit Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low and dry flat in shade inside out Warm iron Crafted from cotton knit, this ribbed T-shirt from john players is designed to offer exemplary comfort and style. The jet black colour with white accents ups your energy factor, while the ribbed cuffs sit snug on well-toned arms. Team it with jeans and sneakers.
